late_night_chill.name: Late Night Chill
late_night_chill.vibe: Perfect for winding down late at night. Smooth, atmospheric tracks with mellow vibes and introspective lyrics. Great for studying, relaxing alone, or just letting the day pass by.

songs.title: Skin
songs.vibe: Dreamy electronic track with ethereal vocals and ambient production. Perfect for late-night reflection.

songs.title: Holocene
songs.vibe: Sparse, intimate folk arrangement with falsetto vocals. Creates a sense of quiet contemplation.

songs.title: Awake
songs.vibe: Ambient electronic with warm synths and steady groove. Hypnotic and immersive.

songs.title: Limit to Your Love
songs.vibe: Minimalist R&B production with a pained vocal delivery. Intimate and vulnerable.

songs.title: Music Has the Right to Children
songs.vibe: Nostalgic electronic with analog warmth and soft melodies. Like a daydream from childhood.

workout_motivation.name: Workout Motivation
workout_motivation.vibe: High-energy bangers that fuel your workout. Hard-hitting beats, confident vocals, and pure adrenaline. Perfect for running, lifting, or any intense physical activity.

songs.title: Stronger
songs.vibe: Iconic beat with crisp production and arrogant swagger. Makes you feel unstoppable.

songs.title: Physical
songs.vibe: Upbeat synth-pop with infectious energy. Repetitive hook that gets stuck in your head while pumping iron.

songs.title: Firestarter
songs.vibe: Aggressive electronic with pounding drums. Pure adrenaline and attitude.

songs.title: Eye of the Tiger
songs.vibe: Classic pump-up anthem with legendary synth riff and power. Timeless motivation.

songs.title: bailar
songs.vibe: this song gives me a lot of energy and hypes me up. I also love to dance and workout to this song

romantic_evening.name: Romantic Evening
romantic_evening.vibe: Smooth, sensual tracks perfect for intimate moments. Soft vocals, warm instrumentation, and a touch of vulnerability. Great for dinner, slow dancing, or deep conversations.

songs.title: Thinkin Bout You
songs.vibe: Tender acoustic guitar with smooth vocals about yearning. Delicate and sincere.

songs.title: Smooth Operator
songs.vibe: Silky smooth R&B with sophisticated arrangement. Oozes class and sultry confidence.

songs.title: On & On
songs.vibe: Neo-soul jam with hypnotic groove and breathy vocals. Effortlessly cool and intimate.

songs.title: Make You Feel My Love
songs.vibe: Intimate piano ballad with powerful, emotional vocal. Simple and deeply personal.

indie_discovery.name: Indie Discovery
indie_discovery.vibe: Quirky, artistic indie tracks with personality. Guitar-driven melodies, unexpected song structures, and unconventional production. For the adventurous listener who likes discovering hidden gems.

songs.title: The Less I Know The Better
songs.vibe: Funky psychedelic pop with synth bass and layered production. Catchy yet weird in the best way.

songs.title: Drunk Drivers/Killer Whales
songs.vibe: Lo-fi indie rock with emotionally raw lyrics and DIY aesthetic. Honest and unpretentious.

songs.title: Chamber of Reflection
songs.vibe: Dreamy jangle-pop with surf-rock undertones and deadpan vocals. Laid-back and contemplative.

songs.title: Myth
songs.vibe: Ethereal dream-pop with reverb-heavy vocals and minimalist synths. Atmospheric and hypnotic.

songs.title: Archie, Marry Me
songs.vibe: Jangly indie pop with infectious hooks and nostalgic 90s vibes. Quirky and endearing.

morning_energy.name: Morning Energy
morning_energy.vibe: Uplifting, feel-good tracks to start your day right. Positive vibes, bright instrumentation, and infectious rhythms. Perfect for your morning routine or a sunny day.

songs.title: Happy
songs.vibe: Pure joy in song form. Impossibly upbeat with clapping, whistling, and infectious positivity.

songs.title: Walking on Sunshine
songs.vibe: Joyful 80s anthem with bright synths and soaring vocals. Impossible not to smile.

songs.title: Another Love
songs.vibe: Feel-good indie-pop with piano and uplifting melody. Gentle but energizing.

songs.title: Electric Feel
songs.vibe: Sunny synth-pop with groove and levity. Quirky funk that gets your day moving.

songs.title: bailar
songs.vibe: this song gives me a lot of energy and hypes me up. I also love to dance and workout to this song
